checks.summary: 18 assertions passed: 6 pre-existing plus 12 new regression tests covering FE-FIX-02 through FE-FIX-05.

Repo-wide lint failed on 87 pre-existing errors outside this sprint scope, same count/pattern as prior sprint handoffs.

notes: Source gating confirms list/light analytics queries use enabled: !isAnalysisView and analysis uses enabled: isAnalysisView, unchanged by this sprint.

Institution/topic click-through verified by source trace: AnalysisEntityPanel -> handleEntityFilter -> updateFilters -> buildPaperVnAnalysisParams -> /articles/analysis, which shares articleFilter.service.js with /articles on the BE (confirmed institution_id and primary-or-Sub_Topic topic_id support).
Browser interactive/network panel verification was not available in this run; HTTP smoke and source-level evidence were used instead.
No backend changes, new dependencies, schema/crawler changes, or commits were made, per PRD non-goals.
